---
title: "Projects"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172a 0%,#162032 100%); padding:3.5rem 2rem 3rem;">
  <div style="max-width:900px; margin:0 auto;">
    <div class="hero-eyebrow" style="margin-bottom:1rem;">Portfolio</div>
    <h1 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(1.8rem,4vw,2.8rem); font-weight:800; color:#f1f5f9; margin:0 0 .75rem; letter-spacing:-.03em;">Featured Projects</h1>
    <p style="color:#94a3b8; font-size:1.05rem; margin:0; max-width:560px;">
      A selection of professional and academic work across data engineering, 
      business intelligence, and automation.
    </p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="section">

  <!-- Featured Project -->
  <h2 class="section-title">Highlighted Work</h2>

  <div style="background:var(--white); border:1.5px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius); padding:2.25rem; margin-bottom:2rem; box-shadow:var(--shadow);">
    <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start; gap:1rem; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:1rem;">
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace; font-size:.75rem; color:#0ea5e9; letter-spacing:.06em; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:.3rem;">Featured · Production</div>
        <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1.35rem; font-weight:800; color:#0f172a; margin:0;">Curb Management Analytics Platform</h3>
      </div>
      <span style="background:rgba(14,165,233,.1); border:1.5px solid rgba(14,165,233,.25); color:#0284c7; font-family:'DM Mono',monospace; font-size:.75rem; border-radius:6px; padding:.3rem .8rem; white-space:nowrap;">Umojo · 2022–Present</span>
    </div>
    <p style="color:#475569; line-height:1.7; margin-bottom:1.25rem;">
      End-to-end analytics solution for real-time curb management reporting in urban environments. 
      Built comprehensive metrics for Occupancy, Availability, Compliance, and Turnover rates, 
      delivering live insights to city planners and operations teams. Integrated Azure Stream Analytics 
      for continuous data ingestion and embedded Power BI reports with Row-Level Security (RLS) 
      for controlled multi-tenant data access.
    </p>
    <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px,1fr)); gap:1rem; margin-bottom:1.25rem;">
      <div style="background:#f8fafc; border:1.5px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:8px; padding:1rem;">
        <div style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1.6rem; font-weight:800; color:#0ea5e9;">4</div>
        <div style="font-size:.8rem; color:#64748b;">Core KPI Metrics</div>
      </div>
      <div style="background:#f8fafc; border:1.5px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:8px; padding:1rem;">
        <div style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1.6rem; font-weight:800; color:#0ea5e9;">Real-time</div>
        <div style="font-size:.8rem; color:#64748b;">Data Processing</div>
      </div>
      <div style="background:#f8fafc; border:1.5px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:8px; padding:1rem;">
        <div style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1.6rem; font-weight:800; color:#0ea5e9;">RLS</div>
        <div style="font-size:.8rem; color:#64748b;">Multi-tenant Security</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="project-tags">
      <span class="project-tag">Power BI</span>
      <span class="project-tag">Azure Stream Analytics</span>
      <span class="project-tag">DAX</span>
      <span class="project-tag">Row-Level Security</span>
      <span class="project-tag">Microsoft Fabric</span>
      <span class="project-tag">Python</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Project Grid -->
  <div class="projects-grid">

    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-icon">🏗️</div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace; font-size:.73rem; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:.2rem;">Umojo · 2023</div>
        <p class="project-title">Microsoft Fabric Migration</p>
      </div>
      <p class="project-desc">
        Led the full migration of existing Power BI infrastructure to Microsoft Fabric, 
        optimizing report performance and capacity utilization. Redesigned data models 
        and implemented Lakehouses for improved data governance and cost efficiency.
      </p>
      <div class="project-tags">
        <span class="project-tag">Microsoft Fabric</span>
        <span class="project-tag">Power BI</span>
        <span class="project-tag">Lakehouse</span>
        <span class="project-tag">DAX</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-icon">⚙️</div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace; font-size:.73rem; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:.2rem;">Chevron (TCO) · 2021–2022</div>
        <p class="project-title">QA/QC Data Pipeline & Reporting</p>
      </div>
      <p class="project-desc">
        Managed digitalization of quality assurance workflows for the 3GP Quality team at 
        Tengizchevroil. Built end-to-end ETL pipelines using Azure Data Factory and SSIS, 
        producing standardized analytical dashboards for partner project teams.
      </p>
      <div class="project-tags">
        <span class="project-tag">Azure Data Factory</span>
        <span class="project-tag">SSIS</span>
        <span class="project-tag">Power BI</span>
        <span class="project-tag">Power Apps</span>
        <span class="project-tag">SQL</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-icon">📱</div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace; font-size:.73rem; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:.2rem;">Chevron (TCO) · 2019–2021</div>
        <p class="project-title">Enterprise Power Platform Suite</p>
      </div>
      <p class="project-desc">
        Developed a suite of canvas and model-driven Power Apps integrated with Dataverse, 
        SharePoint, and SQL Server. Automated business workflows with Power Automate, 
        replacing manual processes across multiple operational departments.
      </p>
      <div class="project-tags">
        <span class="project-tag">Power Apps</span>
        <span class="project-tag">Power Automate</span>
        <span class="project-tag">Dataverse</span>
        <span class="project-tag">SharePoint</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-icon">🤖</div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace; font-size:.73rem; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:.2rem;">Raimbek Group · 2017–2019</div>
        <p class="project-title">FMCG NLP Analytics Engine</p>
      </div>
      <p class="project-desc">
        Applied Python NLP libraries to analyze large-volume consumer and market datasets 
        for Kazakhstan's leading FMCG company. Produced trending analysis reports and 
        KPI scorecards supporting executive decision-making across 50+ SKUs.
      </p>
      <div class="project-tags">
        <span class="project-tag">Python</span>
        <span class="project-tag">NLP</span>
        <span class="project-tag">Power BI</span>
        <span class="project-tag">SQL</span>
        <span class="project-tag">DAX</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-icon">📈</div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace; font-size:.73rem; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:.2rem;">EPAM / Analytic.li · 2021</div>
        <p class="project-title">Dashboard Performance Optimization</p>
      </div>
      <p class="project-desc">
        Served as Power BI developer on a client analytics platform, conducting deep 
        DAX formula performance analysis and investigating Tabular Object Models (TOM) 
        and XMLA endpoints to significantly reduce report load times.
      </p>
      <div class="project-tags">
        <span class="project-tag">Power BI</span>
        <span class="project-tag">TOM</span>
        <span class="project-tag">XMLA</span>
        <span class="project-tag">DAX</span>
        <span class="project-tag">Performance Tuning</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-icon">🎓</div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace; font-size:.73rem; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:.2rem;">Boston University · 2025–2026</div>
        <p class="project-title">Graduate Analytics Projects</p>
      </div>
      <p class="project-desc">
        Applied business analytics projects as part of the BU M.S. program, including 
        web analytics, predictive modeling, and data-driven decision frameworks. 
        Projects cover topics in machine learning, statistics, and business strategy.
      </p>
      <div class="project-tags">
        <span class="project-tag">Python</span>
        <span class="project-tag">Machine Learning</span>
        <span class="project-tag">Web Analytics</span>
        <span class="project-tag">Statistics</span>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```
